zh.Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United King: 英國英格蘭艾可分格林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Tobias Makin於1548年出生在英國艾可可爾斯特時，他的父親John Makin Sr26歲，母親Katherine Sherman22歲。他於1577年10月14日與Katherine Westbrome在英國艾可阿波頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1610年5月14日在英國英格蘭艾可分格林享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可分格林。

zh-hans.Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United King: 英国英格兰艾可分格林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tobias Makin于1548年出生在英国艾可可爾斯特时，他的父亲John Makin Sr26岁，母亲Katherine Sherman22岁。他于1577年10月14日与Katherine Westbrome在英国艾可阿波頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1610年5月14日在英国英格兰艾可分格林享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可分格林。

nameMeanings.name: Makin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): from the Middle English personal name Maykin, a diminutive of May , a pet form of Mayhew (see Matthew ). Compare Makinson .
English (northwestern): nickname from Middle English maide + diminutive suffix -kin ‘little maid’, perhaps used in a derogatory sense.

variants.name: May
meanings: English: from the Middle English male personal name May, a pet form of Matthew (see Mayhew ).

English, Dutch, and German: from a personal name or nickname taken from the month of May (Middle English, Old French mai, Middle High German meie, from Latin Maius (mensis), from Maia, a minor Roman goddess of fertility). This name was sometimes bestowed on someone born or baptized in the month of May; it was also used to refer to someone of a sunny disposition, or who had some anecdotal connection with the month of May, such as owing a feudal obligation then. In England, this name was possibly also a pet form of Mary or Margaret. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Denmark.

variants.name: Meakin
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire): variant of   Makin   1, 2, and 4.

variants.name: Makins
meanings: English: variant of Makin 1 and 2, with post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Mackins .

nameMeanings.name: Tobias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Hebrew Tobiah ‘God is good’, borne by several characters in the Bible (appearing in the Authorized Version also as Tobijah). In the Middle Ages, however, it was principally associated with the tale of ‘Tobias and the Angel’. According to the Book of Tobit in the Apocrypha, Tobias, the son of Tobit, a rich and righteous Jew of Nineveh, was lucky enough to acquire the services of the archangel Raphael as a travelling companion on a journey to Ecbatana. He returned wealthy, married, and with a cure for his father's blindness. A historical St Tobias was martyred ( c.315 ) at Sebaste in Armenia, together with Carterius, Styriacus, Eudoxius, Agapius, and five others.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Tobias Makin was born in 1548, in Colchester, Essex, England, his father, John Makin Sr, was 26 and his mother, Katherine Sherman, was 22. He married Katherine Westbrome on 14 October 1577, in Abberton, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 14 May 1610, in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tobias Makin est né en 1548, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Makin Sr, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katherine Sherman, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Westbrome le 14 octobre 1577, à Abberton, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1610, à Fingringhoe, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Fingringhoe, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tobias Makin 1548 in Colchester, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Makin Sr 26 und seine Mutter Katherine Sherman 22. Er hat am 14. Oktober 1577 in Abberton, Essex, England Katherine Westbrome geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Mai 1610 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tobias Makin è nato il nel 1548 nel Colchester, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Makin Sr, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Sherman, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Westbrome il 14 ottobre 1577, nel Abberton, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 14 maggio 1610, nel Fingringhoe, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Fingringhoe, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Tobias Makinが1548年にイギリスエセックスコルチェスターで生まれた時，父John Makin Srは26歳，母Katherine Shermanは22歳であった。1577年10月14日にイギリスエセックスアバートンでKatherine Westbromeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1610年5月14日にイギリスイギリスエセックスフィングリングhオで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスフィングリングhオにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Tobias Makin(이)가 1548년 영국 에세스 코체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Makin Sr(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Sherman(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1577년 10월 14일 영국 에세스 애브버턴에서 Katherine Westbrome(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1610년 5월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핑그링호에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핑그링호에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tobias Makin nasceu em 1548, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Makin Sr, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Sherman, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Westbrome em 14 de outubro de 1577, em Abberton, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de maio de 1610, em Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tobias Makin родился в 1548 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Makin Sr было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Sherman, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Westbrome 14 октября 1577 г. в местности эббиртон, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 14 мая 1610 г. в местности фингрингхо, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности фингрингхо, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tobias Makin nació en 1548, en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Makin Sr, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Katherine Sherman, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Katherine Westbrome el 14 de octubre de 1577, en Abberton, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1610, en Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
